analysis_scope: pack-04-invariant (36 test files, 55 unit tests, 5 integration tests, 7 property tests)

p0_invariants_extracted.name: canonical_supply_conservation
p0_invariants_extracted.definition: Total supply of all tokens across all domains (X3Native, X3Evm, X3Svm) must equal genesis mint and never change

test_evidence.coverage: Validates supply invariant across roundtrip transfer
Mints canonical supply, verifies no inflation/deflation

p0_invariants_extracted.name: atomic_all_or_nothing
p0_invariants_extracted.definition: Every transaction executes atomically: either fully succeeds with all state changes OR completely rolls back with no partial changes

test_evidence.test_name: multiple state transitions in Transfers storage
test_evidence.coverage: Comment: 'Every ledger mutation is a single transactional call; it rolls back the entire extrinsic if the invariant would break'
Validates rollback semantics

p0_invariants_extracted.name: bridge_replay_impossible
p0_invariants_extracted.definition: No transaction can execute twice. Every message_id can only be consumed once. Every (source, sender, nonce) tuple can only be used once.

test_evidence.coverage: Layer 1 replay protection: message_id set prevents reuse
Layer 2 replay protection: per-(domain, sender, nonce) prevents resubmission

p0_invariants_extracted.caveat: Sender validation still needed (see Audit 3 findings)

p0_invariants_extracted.name: finality_guarantee
p0_invariants_extracted.definition: Once a transaction is finalized in a block, it cannot be reversed or re-executed

test_evidence.coverage: Grandpa pallet configured for BFT finality
Transfers cannot transition backward once Finalized

p0_invariants_extracted.name: vault_solvency
p0_invariants_extracted.definition: Total reserves must always be >= total liabilities. No vault can become insolvent.

test_evidence.coverage: ExistentialDeposit: 100 MICRO_ATLAS prevents dust accounts
No test showing reserves >= liabilities across all accounts

p0_invariants_extracted.gap_description: Solvency invariant not explicitly tested. Funds could be transferred out faster than deposits, causing insolvency.

p0_invariants_extracted.name: validator_equivocation_detection
p0_invariants_extracted.definition: If a validator signs two different blocks at the same height, this is detected and validator is slashed

test_evidence.coverage: No equivocation detection pallet in construct_runtime!
No pallet-staking or pallet-offences wired

p0_invariants_extracted.gap_description: CRITICAL P0 BLOCKER: Validator equivocation detection not implemented. Validators can sign multiple blocks at same height with no consequences.

p0_invariants_extracted.name: nonce_monotonicity
p0_invariants_extracted.definition: Account nonces only increase. No account can reuse or go backward in nonce sequence.

test_evidence.coverage: NextNonce per-(domain, sender) with DuplicateNonce enforcement
Substrate transaction pool enforces nonce ordering

p0_invariants_extracted.name: settlement_guarantee
p0_invariants_extracted.definition: Once settlement is initiated, it completes atomically. Partial settlement is impossible. Abort or succeed, never partially complete.

test_evidence.coverage: SourceDebited → DestinationCredited → Finalized transitions enforced
King invariant: 'Every ledger mutation is a single transactional call'

p0_invariants_extracted.name: fresh_machine_bootstrap
p0_invariants_extracted.definition: New node starting from block 0 can reach consensus with the network and download full state without trusting any peer

test_evidence.coverage: Chain spec validates correctly
Runtime can initialize from genesis
No test showing fresh node reaching consensus

p0_invariants_extracted.gap_description: Bootstrap tested in single-node but not explicitly multi-node

p0_invariants_extracted.name: multi_node_consensus
p0_invariants_extracted.definition: Multiple validators with >2/3 honest can reach consensus. Forks resolve to canonical chain. No network partition breaks safety.

test_evidence.coverage: Aura configured with AllowMultipleBlocksPerSlot=true
Grandpa BFT consensus with Byzantine threshold
72/72 tests pass but all single-node

p0_invariants_extracted.gap_description: Multi-node consensus not explicitly tested. All 72 unit tests are single-node. Testnet validation pending.

blocking_gaps: INV-005: vault_solvency - no solvency test across all accounts

critical_gaps.description: No test verifies total_reserves >= total_liabilities across all accounts at all times
critical_gaps.impact: Blockchain could become insolvent without detection. Funds could be transferred out faster than deposits arrive.
critical_gaps.exploitation: Craft transactions that transfer out reserves while keeping balances positive
critical_gaps.test_required: integration_test showing solvency preserved across 100 random transactions

critical_gaps.description: No equivocation detection mechanism implemented. pallet-offences was unwired in Audit 1 for being unused.
critical_gaps.impact: Validators can sign multiple blocks at same height. Byzantine safety compromised. Consensus broken.
critical_gaps.exploitation: Run validator, build competing forks, sign both
critical_gaps.test_required: equivocation detection test OR implement staking pallet with slashing

critical_gaps.description: All 72 unit tests are single-node. Multi-validator consensus not tested at all.
critical_gaps.impact: Validators might not reach consensus in production. Network could fork or stall.
critical_gaps.exploitation: Network with competing validators experiences consensus failures
critical_gaps.test_required: testnet validation with 5+ validators, simulate Byzantine faults

reasoning: 6 of 10 P0 invariants are well-verified through comprehensive testing (supply conservation, atomicity, replay protection, finality, nonce monotonicity, settlement). However, THREE CRITICAL BLOCKERS exist: (1) vault_solvency has no explicit test across all accounts, (2) validator_equivocation_detection is not implemented (pallet-offences unwired as unused), (3) multi_node_consensus only tested single-node. Audit 1 correctly identified that pallet-offences was unwired, but this means equivocation detection is MISSING entirely. This must be fixed before mainnet launch.
required_fixes_before_mainnet: 1. CRITICAL: Implement validator equivocation detection (staking pallet OR signed statement tracking) - currently 0% implemented
2. CRITICAL: Add solvency test - verify total_reserves >= total_liabilities across 100+ random transactions
3. CRITICAL: Run multi-node testnet validation - confirm consensus with 5+ validators
